en: It would help if we could decide here and now on your name.
ko: 여기서 당신의 이름을 결정할 수 있다면 도움이 될 것입니다.

en: My name? Yes, ma'am. Your regnal name.
That is the name you will take as Queen. Let's not overcomplicate matters unnecessarily.
My name is Elizabeth. Long live Queen Elizabeth.
Don't you get sick of it all? And lonely? I do.
Which is why it's so important to have the right person by your side.
ko: 그래서 당신 곁에 올바른 사람이 있는 것이 매우 중요합니다.

en: You understand the titles. They are not the job.
She is the job. Loving her.
Protecting her. She is the essence of your duty.
We have a new sovereign, young and a woman.
ko: 우리는 새로운 군주가 있습니다, 젊고 늙은.
